meta.name: description
meta.content: A hub for all things Grilled Cheese - Games, Chat, and More

section.p: The ultimate destination for games, chat, and community. Access your favorite content all in one place.
Connect with other users in our WebSocket-powered chat room. Meet new friends and discuss your favorite games!

div.style: height: 200px; border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 10px; overflow-y: auto; background: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 10px;

button.style: padding: 10px 20px; background: #3498db; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;

section.p: This is your central hub for entertainment and community. We provide a curated selection of games and a platform for connecting with other users.

footer.p: © 2025 Grilled Cheese Hub. All rights reserved.
